title: Homepage Load and Components
description: Verify homepage loads successfully with all main sections visible (Hero, Events, Services, About, etc.)

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify main sections are visible: Hero section, Live Events section, Featured Events section, Services section
Verify navigation menu is visible and functional
Verify footer is visible
Verify page title is present

title: Events Listing Page Load
description: Verify events listing page loads and displays event cards with pagination

steps.description: Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify events grid/list container is present (may be empty)
Verify search/filter functionality is visible (if present)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if events exist)

title: Event Details Page Load
description: Verify event details page loads successfully with all event information

steps.description: Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Wait for event cards to load
Click on the first available event card (if events exist)
Verify event details page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify event title is visible
Verify event date and time information is displayed
Verify event location information is displayed
Verify event description or details section is visible
Verify navigation back to events listing is available

title: Gallery Page Load
description: Verify gallery page loads successfully with tabs and media grid

steps.description: Navigate to gallery page (/gallery)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify gallery tabs (Albums Gallery, Event Based Galleries) are visible
Verify gallery grid container is present
Verify search/filter functionality is visible (if present)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if media exists)

title: Gallery Tab Switching
description: Verify gallery tabs can be switched between Albums and Event Based Galleries

steps.description: Navigate to gallery page (/gallery)
Wait for gallery tabs to load
Click on 'Event Based Galleries' tab (if not already selected)
Verify tab switches successfully
Verify event-based gallery content is displayed
Click on 'Albums Gallery' tab
Verify tab switches back to Albums Gallery
Verify albums gallery content is displayed

title: About Page Load via Dropdown
description: Verify about page loads successfully via About dropdown menu

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/) to access navigation menu
Hover over the 'About' menu item in the navigation header to open the dropdown menu
Wait for the dropdown menu to appear (should contain 'About Us' and optionally 'Team' submenu items)
Click on the 'About Us' submenu item in the dropdown menu
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify the About Us section is visible on the page (either via hash navigation to #about-us or full page load)
Verify page content is visible

title: Contact Page Load via Dropdown
description: Verify contact section loads successfully via Contact dropdown menu

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/) to access navigation menu
Click on the 'Contact' menu item in the navigation header
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify the Contact section is visible on the page (either via hash navigation to #contact or full page load)
Verify contact form or contact information is visible

title: Polls Listing Page Load
description: Verify polls listing page loads successfully

steps.description: Navigate to polls page (/polls)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify polls container or content is visible (may be empty)
Verify search/filter functionality is visible (if present)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if polls exist)

title: Poll Details Page Load
description: Verify poll details page loads successfully with poll information

steps.description: Navigate to polls listing page (/polls)
Wait for poll cards to load
Click on the first available poll card (if polls exist)
Verify poll details page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify poll title is visible
Verify poll question or description is visible
Verify poll options or voting interface is visible (if poll is active)
Verify poll status (Active, Ended, Not Started) is displayed

title: Calendar Page Load
description: Verify calendar page loads successfully

steps.description: Navigate to calendar page (/calendar)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify calendar component or calendar view is visible
Verify event listings or calendar events are displayed (if present)

title: Pricing Page Load
description: Verify pricing page loads successfully with membership plans

steps.description: Navigate to pricing page (/pricing)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify pricing content or membership plans are visible
Verify membership plan cards or pricing tables are displayed (if plans exist)

title: Sponsors Listing Page Load
description: Verify sponsors listing page loads successfully

steps.description: Navigate to sponsors page (/sponsors)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify sponsors grid or list container is present (may be empty)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if sponsors exist)

title: Sponsor Details Page Load
description: Verify sponsor details page loads successfully

steps.description: Navigate to sponsors listing page (/sponsors)
Wait for sponsor cards to load
Click on the first available sponsor card (if sponsors exist)
Verify sponsor details page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify sponsor name is visible
Verify sponsor logo or image is displayed (if present)
Verify sponsor description or details are visible

title: Focus Groups Listing Page Load
description: Verify focus groups listing page loads successfully

steps.description: Navigate to focus groups page (/focus-groups)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify focus groups grid or list container is present (may be empty)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if focus groups exist)

title: Focus Group Details Page Load
description: Verify focus group details page loads successfully

steps.description: Navigate to focus groups listing page (/focus-groups)
Wait for focus group cards to load
Click on the first available focus group card (if focus groups exist)
Verify focus group details page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify focus group name or title is visible
Verify focus group description or details are visible

title: Charity Theme Page Load
description: Verify charity theme page loads successfully

steps.description: Navigate to charity theme page (/charity-theme)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify page title and header are visible
Verify main content sections are visible

title: Navigation Menu Functionality
description: Verify navigation menu works correctly across public pages

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/)
Verify navigation menu is visible
Click on 'Events' menu item
Verify navigation to /events page is successful
Click on 'Gallery' menu item
Verify navigation to /gallery page is successful
Click on 'Home' menu item
Verify navigation back to homepage is successful

title: Footer Visibility and Links
description: Verify footer is visible and functional on public pages

steps.description: Navigate to homepage (/)
Verify footer is visible at the bottom of the page
Verify footer contains copyright or organization information
Navigate to events page (/events)
Verify footer is visible on events page
Navigate to gallery page (/gallery)
Verify footer is visible on gallery page

title: Responsive Design - Mobile View
description: Verify public pages are responsive and work on mobile viewport

steps.description: Set viewport to mobile size (375x667)
Navigate to homepage (/)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify mobile navigation menu is accessible (hamburger menu if present)
Verify content is readable and not cut off
Navigate to events page (/events)
Verify events grid adapts to mobile layout

title: Search Functionality on Events Page
description: Verify search functionality works on events listing page

steps.description: Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Wait for page to load completely
Locate search input field (if present)
Type a search query in the search field
Verify search results update (if events exist)
Verify filtered events are displayed correctly

title: Pagination on Events Page
description: Verify pagination controls work correctly on events listing page

steps.description: Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Wait for events to load
Verify pagination controls are visible (if more than one page of events exists)
Click on 'Next' button (if available)
Verify next page of events loads successfully
Click on 'Previous' button (if available)
Verify previous page of events loads successfully

title: Gallery Search and Filter
description: Verify search and filter functionality works on gallery page

steps.description: Navigate to gallery page (/gallery)
Wait for gallery content to load
Locate search input field (if present)
Type a search query in the search field
Verify search results update (if media exists)
Verify filtered gallery items are displayed correctly

title: Event Media Gallery Display
description: Verify event media gallery displays correctly on event details page

steps.description: Navigate to events listing page (/events)
Click on the first available event card (if events exist)
Scroll down to media gallery section (if present)
Verify media gallery section is visible
Verify media thumbnails are displayed (if media exists)
Click on a media thumbnail (if available)
Verify media opens in slideshow or modal view
